sentences.target: On se retrouve au foyer après le cours.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o fwaje apʁɛ lə kuʁ/

translations.fr: On se retrouve au foyer après le cours.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv o fwaje apʁɛ lə kuʁ/
translations.en: We’re meeting at the lounge after class.
translations.es: Nos vemos en la sala común después de clase.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns nach dem Unterricht im Aufenthaltsraum.
translations.it: Ci vediamo nella sala comune dopo la lezione.
translations.zh-Hans: 下课后我们在休息室见面。
translations.yue: 下堂之後我哋喺休息室見。
translations.ru: Встретимся в комнате отдыха после занятий.
translations.pt: Nos encontramos na sala de convivência depois da aula.
translations.vi: Chúng mình gặp nhau ở phòng sinh hoạt sau giờ học.
translations.ar: سنلتقي في صالة الاستراحة بعد المحاضرة.
translations.nl: We spreken af in de lounge na de les.
translations.uk: Зустрінемося в кімнаті відпочинку після занять.
translations.hi: क्लास के बाद हम लाउंज में मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się po zajęciach w sali wspólnej.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε στο σαλόνι μετά το μάθημα.
translations.nb: Vi møtes i studentloungen etter timen.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di ruang santai setelah kelas.
translations.sv: Vi ses i loungen efter lektionen.
translations.ro: Ne vedem în sala de relaxare după curs.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se po hodině v studentském salonku.
translations.da: Vi mødes i loungen efter timen.
translations.ja: 授業の後でラウンジで会おう。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (often used for ‘we’ in colloquial French); controls 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Clitic reflexive pronoun marking the pronominal verb ‘se retrouver’ (here, mutual/reciprocal sense ‘to meet each other’).
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; with ‘se’ forms the pronominal ‘se retrouver’ (‘to meet/find each other’).
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the masculine singular article ‘le’ (à + le → au); introduces the location.
Common noun (masc.); here refers to a communal lounge or lobby space; object of the preposition ‘au’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement (‘après le cours’ = after the class).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘cours’.
Common noun (masc., invariant in singular/plural form); here denotes a lesson/class.

sentences.target: Notre foyer dépense trop ce mois-ci.

translations.fr: Notre foyer dépense trop ce mois-ci.
translations.en: Our household is spending too much this month.
translations.es: En casa estamos gastando demasiado este mes.
translations.de: Unser Haushalt gibt diesen Monat zu viel aus.
translations.it: In casa stiamo spendendo troppo questo mese.
translations.ko: 우리 집은 이번 달에 돈을 너무 많이 쓰고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们家这个月花钱花得太多了。
translations.yue: 我哋屋企今個月用錢用得太多。
translations.ru: Наша семья в этом месяце тратит слишком много.
translations.pt: Aqui em casa estamos gastando demais este mês.
translations.he: בבית אנחנו מוציאים יותר מדי כסף החודש.
translations.tr: Bu ay evde çok fazla para harcıyoruz.
translations.vi: Tháng này gia đình mình chi tiêu quá nhiều.
translations.ar: نحن في البيت ننفق أكثر من اللازم هذا الشهر.
translations.nl: Ons huishouden geeft deze maand te veel uit.
translations.uk: Цього місяця наша родина витрачає надто багато.
translations.hu: Otthon ebben a hónapban túl sokat költünk.
translations.hi: इस महीने हम घर में बहुत ज़्यादा खर्च कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: W tym miesiącu nasza rodzina wydaje za dużo.
translations.el: Το νοικοκυριό μας ξοδεύει πάρα πολύ αυτόν τον μήνα.
translations.nb: Denne måneden bruker husholdningen vår for mye penger.
translations.id: Bulan ini rumah tangga kami mengeluarkan terlalu banyak uang.
translations.sv: Vårt hushåll spenderar för mycket den här månaden.
translations.ro: Luna aceasta gospodăria noastră cheltuiește prea mult.
translations.cs: Naše domácnost tento měsíc utrácí příliš mnoho.
translations.da: Vores husholdning bruger for mange penge denne måned.
translations.ja: 今月、うちの家計は使いすぎている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; modifies ‘foyer’.
Common noun (masc.); here denotes a household (as a domestic unit). Subject of the verb.
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the subject ‘Notre foyer’.
Degree adverb modifying the verb; indicates excess (‘spends too much’).
Demonstrative determiner (masc.); with ‘mois’ and ‘ci’ forms the deictic expression ‘ce mois-ci’ (‘this month’).
Common noun (masc., invariable); head of the NP ‘ce mois-ci’.
Deictic particle attached to a demonstrative NP (‘ce X-ci’) to mark proximity (‘this’).

sentences.target: Il attend dans le foyer du théâtre.
sentences.reading: /il atɑ̃ dɑ̃ lə fwaje dy teatʁ/

translations.fr: Il attend dans le foyer du théâtre.
translations.ipa: /il atɑ̃ dɑ̃ lə fwaje dy teatʁ/
translations.en: He's waiting in the theater lobby.
translations.es: Está esperando en el vestíbulo del teatro.
translations.pt: Ele está esperando no saguão do teatro.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang đợi ở sảnh nhà hát.
translations.nl: Hij wacht in de foyer van het theater.
translations.hi: वह थिएटर की लॉबी में इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.ja: 彼は劇場のロビーで待っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular (masc.).
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘foyer’.
Common noun (masc.); here refers to the lobby/foyer area of a venue.
Preposition ‘de’ contracted with the masculine article ‘le’ (de + le → du); introduces a genitive (‘du théâtre’).
Common noun (masc.); complement of ‘du’ specifying which foyer.

sentences.target: Ils rénovent le foyer du quartier.

translations.fr: Ils rénovent le foyer du quartier.
translations.en: They're renovating the neighborhood community center.
translations.es: Están renovando el centro comunitario del barrio.
translations.it: Stanno ristrutturando il centro civico del quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在翻新社区中心。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度翻新社區中心。
translations.pt: Eles estão reformando o centro comunitário do bairro.
translations.he: הם משפצים את המרכז הקהילתי בשכונה.
translations.vi: Họ đang cải tạo trung tâm cộng đồng của khu phố.
translations.ar: إنهم يجددون مركز المجتمع في الحي.
translations.nl: Ze zijn het buurthuis aan het renoveren.
translations.hi: वे पड़ोस के सामुदायिक केंद्र का नवीनीकरण कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ανακαινίζουν το κοινοτικό κέντρο της γειτονιάς.
translations.nb: De pusser opp nærmiljøsenteret i nabolaget.
translations.id: Mereka sedang merenovasi pusat komunitas di lingkungan itu.
translations.ro: Ei renovează centrul comunitar din cartier.
translations.ja: 近所のコミュニティセンターを改装している。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masc.).
Verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘foyer’.
Common noun (masc.); here likely refers to a neighborhood community center; direct object of ‘rénovent’.
Preposition ‘de’ contracted with ‘le’ (de + le → du); introduces a genitive (‘du quartier’).
Common noun (masc.); complement of ‘du’ specifying which community center.
